text: I feel a sense of intrigue and curiosity in this space—both the architecture and the exhibit speak of modernity and innovation. The quiet, spacious entryway and the glass, reflecting light and shapes, invite contemplation on transparency and the boundaries between inner and outer worlds. Stepping into the vivid, speculative realm of 'R+D,' I'm enveloped by the play of text, screens, and ambiguous objects. I feel my mind drawn toward questions of how knowledge, creativity, and technology are nurtured. There’s an uplifting, expectant energy—a place where ideas are perhaps incubated, and the invitation to introspect and wonder is palpable.
